raw_text:

  "claims": [
    "AB 1138 and SB 630 aim to retain and expand entertainment industry jobs in California.",
    "The legislation seeks to boost small businesses that support production in the film and television industry.",
    "AB 1138 and SB 630 aim to reverse the trend of runaway production responsible for job losses in California.",
    "The tax credit program is being modernized to make California more competitive with other states and countries.",
